nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联78种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等78种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 千里達及托巴哥
nodes.summary: 千里達及托巴哥是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联19种鸟类，包括棕臀稚冠雉、美洲紅鸛、Least grebe等19种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 中美洲
nodes.summary: 中美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联23种鸟类，包括大䳍、小穴䳍、灰胸穴䳍等23种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

nodes.name: Short-tailed nighthawk
nodes.summary: Short-tailed nighthawk（Short-tailed nighthawk，学名 Lurocalis semitorquatus），分类上属于夜鷹目，并归入夜鹰科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Mexico, in every Central American country except El Salvador, in Trinidad and Tobago, and in every mainland South American country except Chile and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Mexico, in every Central American country except El Salvador, in Trinidad and Tobago, and in every mainland South American country except Chile and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The short-tailed nighthawk is widely distributed across Central and northern South America. It primarily inhabits lowland evergreen forest but also is found in more open landscapes such as clearings, river edges, old cacao plantations, and middle-aged secondary forest. The northern populations are generally resident though the seasonal distribution of subspecies in Amazonia is not well known

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The short-tailed nighthawk is widely distributed across Central and northern South America. It primarily inhabits lowland evergreen forest but also is found in more open landscapes such as clearings, river edges, old cacao plantations, and middle-aged secondary forest. The northern populations are generally resident though the seasonal distribution of subspecies in Amazonia is not well known

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No threats other than local deforestation have been identified
